epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Screening test abnormality with colposcopy and biopsy confirmation

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Screening via VIA/Pap in public programs; limited colposcopy in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Surgery or chemoradiation based on stage
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Low screening coverage and delayed diagnosis
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: National programs expanding HPV vaccination and screening
